dt-event.name: rowInvalidate
dt-event.summary: Triggered when the data in a row is updated.

type.parameter: The data index for the row that was updated (for use with `-api row()`).
Column index, if it was the data in a specific column that was updated (e.g. using `-api cell().data()`). Will be undefined if a general row data update.

dt-event.description: It can be useful to know if the data in a row has been updated. You might wish to know this if some other component needs to be updated, or events changed. This event provides exactly that ability.

example.title: Record a message whenever data in a row is updated
